result.stdout:
--help
rdeploy:
  deploy and run command over ssh

Usage:
  rdeploy [options]

Options:
  --username <username>          
  --host <host>                  
  --private-key <private-key>    
  --passphrase <passphrase>      
  --source <source>              
  --destination <destination>    
  --command <command>            
  --version                      Display version information
